TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Corey Benjamin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1978, byacing te 2 ru 24 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 91 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1998 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. 2002-2003 kawas Corey Benjamin maki Bulls cyugal pspung. qnxan nya Benjamin squliq na Oregon Beavers. hiya ga ru Sonny sangka' qutux hlahuy na mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej βenjamin s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorej βenjamin maki βulls~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ. qnxan nja βenjamin s~ɕquliq na oreɣon βea*ers~ɕ. ħija ɣa ru s~ɕonnj s~ɕaŋkaʔ qutux ħlaħuj na mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
S.FORM: Corey Benjamin sraral hya'ga sisyuw na NBA, wal malaxmisuq qaniy la. kawas te 1978, byacing te 2 ru 24 ryax qu hintgan nya, kinhulan nya ga California, hiya ga mnanak na ppzuy mari waya, ru squliq ka ppkal mari waya. 198 kunbun kinwagiq nya, 91 kunkin kin'suw nya, hiya ga qutux nqu spzyang blaq na ppzuy mari NBA. kawas 1998 mnwayaw ppzuy mari ga, mzyup squ te qutux lahuy ru te magal squliq, galun nqu Chicago Bulls. 2002-2003 kawas Corey Benjamin maki Bulls cyugal pspung. qnxan nya Benjamin squliq na Oregon Beavers. hiya ga ru Sonny sangka' qutux hlahuy na mzyu mari. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of National Basketball Association players
S.PHON: ʦ~ʨorej βenjamin s~ɕraral ħjaʔɣa s~ɕis~ɕjuw na nβa, wal malaxmis~ɕuq qanij la. kawas~ɕ te ****, βjaʦ~ʨiŋ te * ru ** rjax qu ħintɣan nja, kinħulan nja ɣa ʦ~ʨali*ornia, ħija ɣa mnanak na ppzuj mari waja, ru s~ɕquliq ka ppkal mari waja. *** kunβun kinwaɣiq nja, ** kunkin kinʔs~ɕuw nja, ħija ɣa qutux nqu s~ɕpzjaŋ βlaq na ppzuj mari nβa. kawas~ɕ **** mnwajaw ppzuj mari ɣa, mzjup s~ɕqu te qutux laħuj ru te maɣal s~ɕquliq, ɣalun nqu ʦ~ʨħiʦ~ʨaɣo βulls~ɕ. ****-**** kawas~ɕ ʦ~ʨorej βenjamin maki βulls~ɕ ʦ~ʨjuɣal ps~ɕpuŋ. qnxan nja βenjamin s~ɕquliq na oreɣon βea*ers~ɕ. ħija ɣa ru s~ɕonnj s~ɕaŋkaʔ qutux ħlaħuj na mzju mari. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* national βas~ɕketβall as~ɕs~ɕoʦ~ʨiation plajers~ɕ
